mapper.sql: select i.id, i.batch_id as batchId, i.batch_no as batchNo, i.row_no as rowNo, i.bank_statement_no as bankStatementNo, i.bank_account_no_mask as bankAccountNoMask, i.bank_name as bankName, i.trade_time as tradeTime, i.amount, i.currency, i.counterparty_name as counterpartyName, i.counterparty_account_no_mask as counterpartyAccountNoMask, i.summary, i.remark, i.reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, i.matched_offline_collection_id as matchedOfflineCollectionId, i.matched_offline_collection_no as matchedOfflineCollectionNo, i.matched_pay_order_no as matchedPayOrderNo, i.match_status as matchStatus, i.match_message as matchMessage, i.confirmed_time as confirmedTime, i.confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, i.confirm_remark as confirmRemark, i.created_at as createTime
mapper.select: select id, batch_id as batchId, batch_no as batchNo, row_no as rowNo, bank_statement_no as bankStatementNo, bank_account_no_mask as bankAccountNoMask, bank_name as bankName, trade_time as tradeTime, trade_date as tradeDate, amount, currency, counterparty_name as counterpartyName, counterparty_account_no_mask as counterpartyAccountNoMask, summary, remark, reconciliation_code as reconciliationCode, matched_offline_collection_id as matchedOfflineCollectionId, matched_offline_collection_no as matchedOfflineCollectionNo, matched_pay_order_no as matchedPayOrderNo, match_status as matchStatus, match_message as matchMessage, confirmed_time as confirmedTime, confirmed_by as confirmedBy, confirmed_by_name as confirmedByName, confirm_remark as confirmRemark, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt, del_flag as delFlag from payment_offline_bank_statement_item where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 limit 1 for update
mapper.update: update payment_offline_bank_statement_item set match_status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_time = #{confirmedTime}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}, confirmed_by_name = #{confirmedByName}, confirm_remark = #{confirmRemark}, updated_by = #{confirmedBy}, updated_at = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and del_flag = 0 and match_status = 'MATCHED_PENDING_CONFIRM'
